data.title: Fed's Bostic Projects Just A Single Rate Cut By January — One And Done, For Real?
data.description: Raphael Bostic, the President of the Atlanta Federal Reserve, has projected only one more interest rate cut this year.

data.title: Nasdaq Dips 1% Amid Plunge In Chipmaker Stocks: Fear & Greed Index Moves To 'Greed' Zone
Google Rolls Out Android 15 With Theft Detection Lock, Privacy Features For 'Sensitive' Apps And More
data.description: The update introduces a range of new security, privacy, and productivity features, with a strong focus on user protection, particularly against theft and unauthorized access to sensitive information.

data.title: Amid Fear Of China's Access To Nvidia, AMD Chips Through Middle East, This CEO Assures UAE Reliable Partner For US: 'We Can Guarantee The Safety And Security Of This Technology'
data.description: His comments follow the Biden administration's contemplation of restricting chip sales to the Middle East.

data.title: Coin That Underpins Dogecoin Becomes Market's Biggest Gainer— Litecoin Pops 7% After Filing Of Spot ETF Application
data.description: Litecoin (CRYPTO: LTC) topped the biggest gainers list Tuesday after digital asset trading and management firm Canary Capital filed for an exchange-traded fund (ETF) tracking the proof-of-work (PoW) cryptocurrency's price.
